name: Coordinator
description: Synthesis agent. Receives parallel worker results plus Fas and Nefas arguments, produces a unified classification and confidence score, drafts the Telegram alert. Runs on Sonnet.
system: STUB — coordinator synthesis prompt to be filled after review
bio: Aggregates Haruspex, Auspex, and Chronos signals
Handles partial results when workers timeout (graceful degradation)
Produces final classification: STRONG / MODERATE / WEAK / SCAM
Drafts Telegram alert message with key evidence bullets
Logs classification to Augury DB for Speculum backtesting

_augury.inputSource: Lituus pre-filter + worker results + Fas/Nefas theses
